chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 797 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 3. For hearing of MA No 3640/2017 30.01.2018. Mr. Pir Bukhsh Bhurgari, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w PI S.Manzoor Ali shah on behalf of SSP Hyderabd, Inspector Manzoor Ali on bhelaf of DIG Hyderabad. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari A.P.G -=-=- Through this petition main grievance of the petitioner is that on 30.8.2016 the Law Enforcement Agencies took away him from the court premises and confined him at some unknown place and after lapse of 16-days he was involved in crime No.113/2016 of police station Hussainabad in which he has been granted bail, therefore, under the circumstances, he prayed that action be taken against the respondents who are police officials. After hearing learned counsel for the parties at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this constitutional petition if appropriate directions are given to the official respondents to provide protection to life and property of the petitioner. Learned Asstt:A.G and learned APG present in court have stated that official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
